import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(lines)
  match list.get(lines, i)
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    if list.len(tokens) >= 2
      match list.get(tokens, 1)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          total = total + n
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("sum=#{total}")
